segment.source: Present one plan with its price, billing period, ticked feature list, and a call-to-action, optionally highlighted as recommended.
segment.target: Present one plan with its price, billing period, ticked feature list, and a call-to-action, optionally highlighted as recommended.

segment.source: Optional cadence shown next to the price, e.g. per user / month or billed annually.
segment.target: Cadence facultative affichée près du prix, par ex. par utilisateur / mois ou facturation annuelle.

segment.source: Marks this as the recommended plan with an accent ring and a badge.
segment.target: Marque ce forfait comme recommandé avec un liseré d'accentuation et un badge.
